name: tmux-team
description: Multi-agent tmux team for Scrum-style projects. Default 3-role team: PO (po plugin), DEV (dev plugin), QC (qc plugin). Each pane runs `claude --agent <role>`; board state lives as Obsidian Kanban markdown in docs/board/; SessionStart hook injects team workflow + sprint + backlog at pane start. Successor to tmux-team-creator-md.
